wine_experiences.name: Domäne Wachau Wine.Vineyard.Flight - Helicopter over UNESCO Vines
wine_experiences.experience_type: helicopter aerial tour with exclusive winery tasting
wine_experiences.duration: 20 minutes flight plus 2 hours at winery
wine_experiences.description: An aerial helicopter tour over the UNESCO World Heritage vineyard terraces of the Wachau, followed by a private tasting of Domäne Wachau's Smaragd Rieds at the Kellerschlössel. Reservations via the estate office.

wine_experiences.name: Domäne Wachau Wine.Vineyard.Yacht - Private Danube Tasting
wine_experiences.experience_type: private yacht Danube cruise with estate wine tasting
wine_experiences.description: A private Danube cruise on the yacht 'Anatole' at 25 knots from Krems to Spitz, combining on-board tasting of Domäne Wachau's portfolio with views of the UNESCO vineyard terraces from the water. Reservations via the estate office.

wine_experiences.name: Domäne Wachau Wine.Vineyard.Picnic
wine_experiences.experience_type: self-guided vineyard picnic with wine backpack
wine_experiences.description: A self-guided Wachau vineyard picnic experience: collect a curated backpack of wines, regional snacks and a terrace blanket from the Vinothek and explore the Ried terraces between Dürnstein and Spitz at your own pace. Reservations via the estate office.

wine_experiences.name: Nikolaihof Biodynamic Harvest & Cellar Experience
wine_experiences.address: Nikolaigasse 3, 3512 Mautern an der Donau, Austria
wine_experiences.experience_type: biodynamic harvest participation with estate tasting
wine_experiences.description: A hands-on harvest experience at Austria's oldest Demeter-certified biodynamic winery, guided by the Saahs family. Participants learn lunar-calendar viticulture, hand-harvest Grüner Veltliner or Riesling grapes, and taste wine from the Roman-foundation cellar with Christine Saahs' organic meal.

wine_experiences.name: Singerriedel Vineyard Hike - Spitz
wine_experiences.address: Tourist Information Spitz, Mittergasse 3a, 3620 Spitz an der Donau, Austria
wine_experiences.experience_type: guided vineyard hike to historic Singerriedel Riesling terraces
wine_experiences.pricing: From EUR 35 per person with Private Wachau Tours or similar; self-guided free
wine_experiences.description: A walking ascent through the Spitz vineyards to the Red Gate and the Singerriedel terrace, a named single-vineyard site above Spitz associated with Weingut Franz Hirtzberger. The hike offers panoramic views of the Danube bend and the entire UNESCO landscape.

wine_experiences.name: Steinfeder Night at Schloss Spitz - Wachauer Weinfrühling
wine_experiences.address: Schloss Spitz, 3620 Spitz an der Donau, Austria
wine_experiences.experience_type: annual evening wine gala at historic castle during Wine Spring weekend
wine_experiences.duration: 17:30-01:00 (annual event, Saturday of Wine Spring weekend, typically late April/early May)
wine_experiences.pricing: EUR 20 cash entry; wristband holders receive 2 wine vouchers
wine_experiences.description: The Steinfeder Night at Schloss Spitz is the flagship evening event of the annual Wachauer Weinfrühling: three wine bars set up in the castle grounds pour Vinea Wachau wines with live music and food until 01:00. A uniquely atmospheric late-evening Wachau wine experience.

wine_experiences.name: Steigenberger Torch-Lit Vineyard Hike
wine_experiences.address: Am Goldberg 2, 3500 Krems an der Donau, Austria
wine_experiences.experience_type: evening torch-lit guided hike through hotel vineyard with wine tasting
wine_experiences.pricing: Included in special packages; supplement for non-package guests
wine_experiences.description: An evening guided torch-lit hike through the Steigenberger Hotel's own hilltop vineyard above Krems, with views of the UNESCO Wachau valley illuminated at dusk. Wine pairings at the Smaragd bar conclude the experience.

verified.address_quoted: Am Goldberg 2, 3500, Krems an der Donau

wine_experiences.name: Domäne Wachau Wine.Vineyard.Safari - Jeep Vineyard Exploration
wine_experiences.experience_type: off-road Jeep tour through steep UNESCO vineyard terraces with naturalist guide
wine_experiences.pricing: EUR 280 per person for groups of 3-20
wine_experiences.description: A naturalist-guided Jeep exploration of the steep UNESCO Wachau vineyard terraces, accessing areas unreachable on foot or bicycle. The tour combines geology, viticulture history and live tasting of single-vineyard wines with views across the Danube valley.

wine_experiences.name: Domäne Wachau Wine.Vineyard.SUP - Stand-Up Paddleboard
wine_experiences.experience_type: stand-up paddleboard on the Danube with winery visit
wine_experiences.pricing: EUR 80 per person for groups of 6-15
wine_experiences.description: A stand-up paddleboard session on the Danube between Dürnstein and Spitz, with the UNESCO vineyard terraces rising on both banks, followed by a winery tour and tasting at the Domäne Wachau Kellerschlössel. Combine river and vine in a single afternoon.

wine_experiences.name: Gartenhotel Pfeffel Wine Weekend Package
wine_experiences.experience_type: wine estate weekend with guided vineyard walks, blind tasting evenings and spa
wine_experiences.pricing: From EUR 280 per person per night (all-inclusive package)
wine_experiences.description: A structured wine weekend package at Gartenhotel & Weingut Pfeffel that combines guided vineyard walks among Dürnstein's terraces, evening blind tastings of house-made brandies at the bar and spa treatments, with own-estate Wachau wines at every meal.
